title: Network and trust boundary for TLS, proxy, CORS, and secret management

tuw_evidence.title: Configure reverse proxy, TLS, domain, redirect, and direct-port denial
Apply CORS allowlist and security headers
Build vault secret management and credential migration

commands.purpose: Verify W03 predecessor state before claiming blocker evidence.
Verify no proxy, TLS, or certificate files exist under infra.

commands.command: find infra .github apps/api apps/web -maxdepth 4 -type f \( -path '*/secrets/*' -o -path '*/vault*' -o -name '*secret*' -o -name '*vault*' -o -name '*.env*' \) -print 2>/dev/null | wc -l
commands.purpose: Verify no vault, secret injection, or environment configuration files exist in the searched launch/runtime locations.

commands.command: rg -n "const HOST = \"127\.0\.0\.1\"|server\.listen\(port, HOST|Binds 127\.0\.0\.1 only" apps/api/src/server.js apps/api/README.md apps/api/test/master-data-api.test.js
output: apps/api/src/server.js:3:// Binds 127.0.0.1 only. Every data route runs through the fail-closed permission
commands.purpose: Verify the current API server is local-only, not a staging proxy/TLS deployment.

output_summary: apps/web source and README state the API has no CORS/OPTIONS handling.
Vite dev proxy forwards /master-data and /api to http://127.0.0.1:4180.
The current web/API integration is local dev proxy, not domain allowlist evidence.
commands.purpose: Verify CORS allowlist and security-header evidence is absent.

commands.command:
test -f docs/launch/l3/deployment-topology.md; printf '%s
' $?; test -f docs/launch/l3/network-trust-boundary.md; printf '%s
' $?; test -f docs/launch/l3/vault-secret-inventory.md; printf '%s
' $?
commands.purpose: Verify deployment topology, network trust boundary, and vault inventory docs are absent.

commands.summary: TUW total 344, WP total 72, violations 0, PASS

blocked_claims: This record does not close LT-L3-W03.
This record does not configure or verify proxy, TLS, domain, redirect, or direct-port denial.
This record does not configure or verify CORS allowlist or HSTS/security headers.
This record does not create a vault, move credentials, or prove vault audit logging.
This record does not open staging or production network access.
This record does not satisfy G4 or L3-EXIT.
This record does not treat the user review waiver as valid review evidence.
